name: PT Indopoly Swakarsa Industry Tbk
summary: PT Indopoly Swakarsa Industry Tbk, together with its subsidiaries, operates as a flexible-packaging manufacturing company in Indonesia, China, Singapore, and the United States. It operates through three segments: Cigarette Packaging, Food Packaging, and Specialty Films. The company manufactures and sells biaxially oriented polypropylene films for cigarette and food packaging, labeling, graphic media, custom overwrap/custom purpose, and green packaging segments; and biaxially oriented polyester films for food packaging, custom overwrap/custom purpose, and graphic media film segments. It is also involved in the investment business. The company markets its products under the Ilene brand name. PT Indopoly Swakarsa Industry Tbk was founded in 1995 and is headquartered in Jakarta, Indonesia.
